model_specification_line: result = smf.wls('full_time ~ daca_eligible + UNEMP + LFPR + C(year) + C(statefip)', data=df, weights=df['perwt']).fit().get_robustcov_results(cov_type='HC1')
treatment_definition: daca_eligible = (birthyr > 1981 or (birthyr == 1981 and birthqtr >= 3)) and (yrimmig <= birthyr + 15) and (yrimmig <= 2007) and (citizen == 2)
